title: Influencer Scraper
description: Search TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and Twitter/X creators with follower, country, engagement, email, industry, and audience filters. Pricing: $8.00 / 1,000 creators.

keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: Creator keyword, topic, niche, or username.

countryCode.title: Creator country code
countryCode.description: Comma-separated ISO country codes, for example US,CA. Common country names such as United States/美国 are normalized automatically.

languageCode.title: Creator language code
languageCode.description: Comma-separated creator content language codes, for example en,es. Common language names such as English/英语 are normalized automatically.

industry.title: Industry or category
industry.description: Industry/category filter. Use supported English category names or IDs. For TikTok, Chinese labels such as 美妆 may not be accepted by the OpenAPI.

followersCntLte.title: Maximum followers
followersCntLte.description: Maximum followers/subscribers. Leave as 0 to omit.

last10AvgVideoViewsLte.title: Maximum average views
last10AvgVideoViewsLte.description: Maximum average views. Leave as 0 to omit.

last10AvgShortVideoViewsGte.title: Minimum short-video average views
last10AvgShortVideoViewsGte.description: YouTube only. Minimum last-10 short-video average views.

last10AvgShortVideoViewsLte.title: Maximum short-video average views
last10AvgShortVideoViewsLte.description: YouTube only. Leave as 0 to omit.

last10AvgShortVideoInteractionRateLte.title: Maximum short-video interaction rate (%)
last10AvgShortVideoInteractionRateLte.description: YouTube only. Leave as 0 to omit.

last10AvgVideoLikesCntGte.title: Minimum average likes
last10AvgVideoLikesCntGte.description: Twitter/X only. Minimum last-10 average likes.

last10AvgVideoLikesCntLte.title: Maximum average likes
last10AvgVideoLikesCntLte.description: Twitter/X only. Leave as 0 to omit.

lastVideoViewsCntGte.title: Minimum latest video views
lastVideoViewsCntGte.description: Twitter/X only. Minimum latest video views.

lastVideoViewsCntLte.title: Maximum latest video views
lastVideoViewsCntLte.description: Twitter/X only. Leave as 0 to omit.

last10VideoViewsPerSubGte.title: Minimum views/followers (%)
last10VideoViewsPerSubGte.description: Twitter/X only. Last-10 average views per follower.

last10VideoViewsPerSubLte.title: Maximum views/followers (%)
last10VideoViewsPerSubLte.description: Twitter/X only. Leave as 0 to omit.

last10MedVideoViewsPerSubGte.title: Minimum median views/followers (%)
last10MedVideoViewsPerSubGte.description: Twitter/X only. Last-10 median views per follower.

last10MedVideoViewsPerSubLte.title: Maximum median views/followers (%)
last10MedVideoViewsPerSubLte.description: Twitter/X only. Leave as 0 to omit.

hasEmail.title: Only creators with email
hasEmail.description: Return only creators with public email contact when supported.

audienceCountryCodeList.title: Audience country codes
audienceCountryCodeList.description: Comma-separated ISO country codes. Common country names are normalized automatically.

audienceLanguageCodeList.title: Audience language codes
audienceLanguageCodeList.description: Comma-separated language codes. Common language names are normalized automatically.

audienceAgeList.title: Audience age groups
audienceAgeList.description: Comma-separated age group IDs or labels when supported.

audienceFemaleRateLte.title: Maximum female audience (%)
audienceFemaleRateLte.description: Maximum female audience percentage. Leave as 0 to omit.

productCategoryIdArray.title: TikTok product category IDs
productCategoryIdArray.description: TikTok only. Comma-separated product category IDs.

last30dayGmvLte.title: TikTok maximum 30-day GMV
last30dayGmvLte.description: TikTok commerce filter. Leave as 0 to omit.

last30dayGpmLte.title: TikTok maximum 30-day GPM
last30dayGpmLte.description: TikTok commerce filter. Leave as 0 to omit.

last30dayGmvPerBuyerLte.title: TikTok maximum 30-day GMV/buyer
last30dayGmvPerBuyerLte.description: TikTok commerce filter. Leave as 0 to omit.

last30dayCommissionRateLte.title: TikTok maximum commission rate (%)
last30dayCommissionRateLte.description: TikTok commerce filter. Leave as 0 to omit.

sortField.title: Sort field
sortField.description: Optional. Leave empty to use a platform-safe default.

maxResults.title: Max billable records
maxResults.description: Maximum records to return and charge for.

size.title: Page size
size.description: Creator/collection page size max 100. Video search is capped at 10.

maxRetries.title: Max retries
maxRetries.description: Retries for temporary CreatiVault API rate-limit and server errors.
